title: Avatar
description: An image element with fallback, status badge, and group stacking support.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the avatar component code.

usage.import: import { Avatar, AvatarBadge, AvatarFallback, AvatarGroup, AvatarGroupCount, AvatarImage } from '@shery-ui/components';

examples.title: Default
examples.description: Use sizes, image fallback, and optional status badge.

examples.title: Avatar Group
examples.description: Stack multiple avatars and show overflow count.
